titleStmt.title: Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 613

p.seg: William king of the Scots to all worthy men of his entire land greeting.

Know me to have granted to God and Saint Cuthbert of Durham and to the monks serving God in that place that they and their sergeands may be free throughout my whole land and quit from every toll on their own cattle and their merchandise, just as the charter of King Malcolm my brother bears witness and confirms. And I forbid that anyone do injustice to them against this liberty within my land, on pain of my forfeiture.
As witnesses, Richard de Morville the constable, Philip de Valognes the chamberlain, Alan son of the Steward.
